mapper.sql:
/* wms-outbound-obAllocateRelease-sql-oracle.xml - selectObAllocateReleaseSql - WMS > 출고 관리 > 할당(RELEASE) - 출고상세정보 조회(헤더) SQL */ SELECT 0 AS CHK , OH.CTKEY /*센터코드*/ , CT.CTNM /*센터명*/ , OH.TOCTKEY /*TO센터코드*/ , TOCT.CTNM AS TOCTNM , OH.OWKEY /*화주사*/ , OH.OBORDKEY /*오더코드*/ , OH.ORHDKEY /*S/O주문번호*/ , OH.EXTERNORDERKEY /*고객주문번호*/ , OH.OBHDKEY /*릴리즈코드*/ , OD.OBDTKEY /*릴리즈상세코드*/ , OH.OBHDDAY /*출고희망일자*/ , OH.OBHDTYPECD /*출고유형*/ , OD.OBDTSTATUSCD /*출고상세상태상태*/ , OD.ICKEY /*상품코드*/ , IC.ICNM /*상품명*/ , ASRT.ASRTMASICKEY /*모상품코드*/ , ASRT.ASRTNM AS ASRTMASICNM /*모상품명*/ , COALESCE(IC.ASRTYN, 'N') AS ASRTYN /*아소트여부*/ , OD.UOM /*단위*/ , COALESCE((COALESCE(OD.EXPCTQTY, 0) - COALESCE(OD.CNFRMQTY, 0)), 0) AS EXPCTQTY /*예정수량(낱개)*/ , COALESCE(OD.ALQTY, 0) AS ALQTY /*할당수량(PCS)*/ , OD.INSERTURKEY /*등록자*/ , OD.INSERTDATE /*등록일시*/ , OD.UPDATEURKEY /*수정자*/ , OD.UPDATEDATE /*수정일시*/ , ICUTX.ICUNITQTY /*단위수량*/ , OD.OBHDKEY||OD.OBDTKEY OBKEY , 'allocate' AS FLAG FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OH INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_DT OD ON OH.CTKEY = OD.CTKEY AND OH.OWKEY = OD.OWKEY AND OH.OBHDKEY = OD.OBHDKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_IC IC ON OD.CTKEY = IC.CTKEY AND OD.OWKEY = IC.OWKEY AND OD.ICKEY = IC.ICKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_MST_ASRT ASRT ON IC.CTKEY = ASRT.CTKEY AND IC.OWKEY = ASRT.OWKEY AND IC.ICKEY = ASRT.ASRTDTICKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_ICUTXTYPE ICUTX ON OD.CTKEY = ICUTX.CTKEY AND OD.OWKEY = ICUTX.OWKEY AND IC.ICUNITKEY = ICUTX.ICUNITKEY AND OD.UOM = ICUTX.ICUNITTYPECD INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_CT CT ON OH.CTKEY = CT.CTKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_MST_CT TOCT ON OH.TOCTKEY = TOCT.CTKEY WHERE 1=1 AND OD.OBDTSTATUSCD IN ('00','05','10') AND OH.OBSTATUSCD IN ('00','05','10') AND OH.WAHDKEY IS NULL AND OH.WKTYPECD IS NULL
AND #{SEARCH_CONDITION}

/* wms-outbound-obAllocateRelease-sql-oracle.xml - selectObAllocateReleaseIvatSql - WMS > 출고 관리 > 할당(RELEASE) - 재고정보 조회 SQL */ SELECT 0 AS CHK , IVATX.CTKEY /*센터코드*/ , IVATX.OWKEY /*화주코드*/ , #{obhdkey} AS OBHDKEY /*출고번호*/ , #{obdtkey} AS OBDTKEY /*출고상세번호*/ , IVATX.ICKEY /*상품코드*/ , IC.ICNM /*상품명*/ , ICUTX.ICUNITTYPECD AS UOM /*단위*/ , AR.ARNM /*구역명*/ , IVATX.LCKEY /*로케이션코드*/ , IVATX.IVATKEY /*재고속성코드*/ , COALESCE((CASE COALESCE(IVATX.AVQTY, 0) WHEN 0 THEN 0 ELSE COALESCE(IVATX.AVQTY, 0) / ICUTX.ICUNITQTY END), 0) AS AVQTY_UNIT /*가용재고수량(단위)*/ , COALESCE((CASE COALESCE(EXAL.EXALQTY, 0) WHEN 0 THEN 0 ELSE COALESCE(EXAL.EXALQTY, 0) / ICUTX.ICUNITQTY END), 0) AS EXALQTY_UNIT /*주문번호에 할당된 수량(단위)*/ , 0 AS MVQTY_UNIT /*할당예정수량(단위)*/ , COALESCE(IVATX.AVQTY, 0) AS AVQTY /*가용재고수량*/ , COALESCE(EXAL.EXALQTY, 0) AS EXALQTY /*주문번호에 할당한 수량*/ , 0 AS MVQTY /*할당예정수량*/ , IVATX.IVSTATUSCD /*재고속성상태*/ , ICUTX.ICUNITQTY AS ICUNITQTY , #{obhdtypecd} AS OBHDTYPECD FROM TWORK_INFO_IVATXLC IVATX INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_IVAT IVAT ON IVATX.CTKEY = IVAT.CTKEY AND IVATX.IVATKEY = IVAT.IVATKEY AND IVATX.OWKEY = IVAT.OWKEY AND IVATX.ICKEY = IVAT.ICKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_LC LC ON IVATX.CTKEY = LC.CTKEY AND IVATX.LCKEY = LC.LCKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_IC IC ON IVAT.CTKEY = IC.CTKEY AND IVAT.ICKEY = IC.ICKEY AND IVAT.OWKEY = IC.OWKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_ICUTXTYPE ICUTX ON IC.CTKEY = ICUTX.CTKEY AND IC.OWKEY = ICUTX.OWKEY AND IC.ICUNITKEY = ICUTX.ICUNITKEY AND ICUTX.ICUNITTYPECD = 'EA' INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_AR AR ON LC.CTKEY = AR.CTKEY AND LC.ARKEY = AR.ARKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_ZN ZN ON AR.CTKEY = ZN.CTKEY AND AR.ZNKEY = ZN.ZNKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT CTKEY , OWKEY , ICKEY , IVATKEY , LCKEY , UOM , SUM(ALQTY) AS EXALQTY FROM TWORK_INFO_AL_DT WHERE CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OWKEY = #{owkey} AND OBHDKEY = #{obhdkey} AND OBDTKEY = #{obdtkey} AND ICKEY = #{ickey} GROUP BY CTKEY , OWKEY , ICKEY , IVATKEY , LCKEY , UOM ) EXAL ON IVATX.CTKEY = EXAL.CTKEY AND IVATX.OWKEY = EXAL.OWKEY AND IVATX.ICKEY = EXAL.ICKEY AND IVATX.IVATKEY = EXAL.IVATKEY AND IVATX.LCKEY = EXAL.LCKEY WHERE IVATX.CTKEY = #{ctkey} -- 센터 AND IVATX.OWKEY = #{owkey} -- 화주 AND IVATX.ICKEY = #{ickey} -- 상품 AND (IVATX.AVQTY > 0 OR EXAL.ICKEY IS NOT NULL) AND IVATX.IVSTATUSCD = '10' -- 재고속성이 "정상" AND COALESCE(LC.LCLIMITDIVCD, '00') NOT IN ('20','40')
AND (LC.LCTYPECD = '90' /*보관 로케이션*/ OR ZN.ZNKEY = 'MLD' /*B2B이고대기구역*/)
AND LC.LCTYPECD = '90' /*보관 로케이션*/
ORDER BY IVAT.EXPDATE , IVATX.AVQTY DESC
mapper.select: /* wms-outbound-obAllocateReleaseManager-sql-oracle.xml - selectAllocateAlStgList - WMS > 출고 관리 > 할당(RELEASE) > 자동할당 - 할당 전략 조회 */ SELECT HD.CTKEY /*센터코드*/ , HD.ALSTGHDKEY /*할당전략헤더키*/ , HD.ALSTGNM /*할당전략명*/ , HD.CMT AS HD_CMT /*할당전략 헤더 비고*/ , DT.DTSEQNO /*상세일련번호*/ , DT.ALSTGATCD /*할당전략속성코드*/ , UPPER(DT.ALSTGATDIVCD) AS ALSTGATDIVCD /*할당전략속성구분코드*/ , DT.ATVALUE1 /*속성값1*/ , DT.ATVALUE2 /*속성값2*/ , DT.CMT AS DT_CMT /*할당전략 상세 비고*/ FROM TWORK_MST_AL_STG_HD HD INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_AL_STG_DT DT ON HD.CTKEY = DT.CTKEY AND HD.ALSTGHDKEY = DT.ALSTGHDKEY WHERE HD.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND HD.USEYN = 'Y' ORDER BY ALSTGATCD ASC, DTSEQNO ASC
